notes: v0.15.0 — SHIP MODULES system. Replaces the skill tree with a modular ship-builder: 67 SHARD modules across 6 slots (CORE / WEAPON / SHIELD / ENGINE / WINGS / FRAME), 5 rarity tiers (Common→Legendary), per-class loadouts with class switcher. Match-end drops at 25% chance with weighted rarity (60% common / 30% uncommon / 9% rare / 1% epic). New stat systems wired into combat: multishot, accuracy, shield max charges, passive shield + HP regen, evasion, bullet reflect, damage-to-energy. Default loadout granted on first install so the ship works minute 1. Existing skill tree allocations stack on top additively. BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS modules ship in v0.15.4+. Windows only.
